items: Builder onboarding opens after the host welcome.

scene01: Countdown question prompts are ready for live chat.

scene02: Welcome music visualizer is synced to live atmosphere cues.

scene03: Presenter layout can switch between boxed and overlay modes.

scene05: Agenda cards map directly to the approved storyboard slide.
Use Builder-first language across host remarks.
